name: affiliate-launchpad-os
description: Affiliate Launchpad Business OS — CRM, Sales, Marketing, Fulfillment & Client Portal

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.setup:
npm run install:all && npm run db:init && echo '
✅  Setup complete! Run: npm run dev
'
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build
